guardrail: Two PSH cohorts do not form a defensible three-population DNNaic topology.
Same founder-generation context is useful biologically but not an independent third population.
Original IDs 28, 29, and 31 were omitted after the paper's DAPC on its 1,189 neutral loci assigned them to the wild/control cluster.
Wild overcatch is a nearby microhabitat cohort, not a temporal descendant population.
Q shares stock, sampling date, joint SNP ascertainment, and source inference with W.
B2 is a sixth-generation selected/founder stock, not a species-tree outgroup.
Candidate exposure orientation if an event exists is P3 to P2 (class C), not a positive truth label.
The source near-null is same-data and detection-limited, not proof of zero gene flow.
